chapter_title.ar: باب فِي تَسْمِيَةِ مَنْ رَآهُ ( عليه السلام )
chapter_title.en: Chapter 77 – Regarding the naming of the ones who saw him<sup>asws</sup>

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (13/ 4)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (13/ 4)
text: هُ أَخْبَرَنِي عَمَّنْ رَآهُ أَنَّهُ خَرَجَ مِنَ الدَّارِ قَبْلَ الْحَادِثِ بِعَشَرَةِ أَيَّامٍ وَ هُوَ يَقُولُ اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّكَ تَعْلَمُ أَنَّهَا مِنْ أَحَبِّ الْبِقَاعِ لَوْ لَا الطَّرْدُ أَوْ كَلَامٌ هَذَا نَحْوُهُ .

en.hubeali: (It has been narrated) from Abu Muhammad Al-Wajnany who informed me about the one who saw him<sup>asws</sup> that he<sup>asws</sup> came out from the house before the occurrence (of the death of his<sup>asws</sup> father<sup>asws</sup>) by ten days, and he<sup>asws</sup> was saying: ‘O Allah<sup>azwj</sup>! You<sup>azwj</sup> Know that it is from the most beloved of the spots had I<sup>asws</sup> not been expelled’, or words approximate to this’.
en.sarwar: 10. Ali ibn Muhammad has narrated from abu Muhammad al-Wajnani who has said the following. “He narrated to me from a person who had seen him (The Imam (a.s) in the words below. ‘He (the twelfth Imam) came out the house ten days before his father would leave this world and said, “O Lord, You know that this is the most lovely place to me, had there been no expulsion.” Or that he spoke a similar expression.”
